name: How to loot - Pin pull
author: Poki
description: How to Loot - Pin pull is a puzzle game where your mission is to solve challenges by pulling the right pins. Embark on an epic adventure to destroy monsters, rescue the princess, and uncover hidden treasures—all by solving intricate puzzles. Pull the correct pins to clear levels, escape danger, and save the day. Are you ready to become the brave knight and conquer every puzzle that stands in your way? How to play How to loot - Pin pull? Swipe right to remove the pin Who created How to loot - Pin pull? How to loot - Pin pull is created by PEGASUS.
